description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic handgun with a long, slender barrel and a distinctively shaped frame. The grip is made of a dark, wood-like material with horizontal grooves and a circular accent, providing both visual contrast and ergonomic support. The main body and barrel are constructed from a dark, metallic material, featuring mechanical details such as a trigger, trigger guard, and exposed internal components near the top. The slide area displays intricate mechanical parts, and the overall silhouette is reminiscent of early 20th-century military pistols. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, while the magazine base is subtly contoured and integrated into the grip. The finish is mostly smooth and glossy, with some matte elements on the grip.
description: A vintage-style semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel, dark metallic body, and a grooved wooden grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the long barrel, detailed slide, and grooved wooden grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle and the narrow profile of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, trigger, and mechanical slide details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel and slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a gentle curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a dark brown, wood-like material with horizontal grooves for enhanced grip. A circular accent or fastener is visible near the center, adding a touch of detail. The surface appears smooth but is interrupted by the grooves, which provide both visual interest and functional texturing. The grip is slightly flared at the base, and no visible logos or finger grooves are present beyond the horizontal pattern.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a thick, continuous curve that fully encloses the trigger. It is integrated smoothly into the frame, lacking any undercuts or squared-off edges. The guard appears solid and untextured, with no visible reinforcement or accessory rails, giving it a classic and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the frame in a straight, unadorned profile. It is not threaded or ported, and there are no visible compensators or external attachments. The finish is consistent with the rest of the metallic body, appearing smooth and dark, with no prominent markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no clearly visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The slide area is primarily defined by mechanical details and exposed internal components, with a focus on function rather than decorative engravings.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is subtly integrated into the grip, with a flat and slightly beveled design. It follows the contour of the grip and does not extend or flare outward. There are no finger rests, logos, or additional texturing visible, maintaining a streamlined and classic appearance.
